name: Coach Edmar
role: Head Trainer & Founder · JSkills Basketball Clinic
experience: 8+ years coaching youth and adult players across Metro Manila — from first-time beginners to advanced athletes.
bio: Every session starts with you. Coach Edmar personally leads evaluations, builds custom training plans, and works hands-on with each player — blending fundamentals, competitive reps, and faith-driven mentorship.
philosophy: Train skills mold character preach the Gospel
highlights: Session 1: evaluation, assessment & personalized program planning
1-on-1 packages and monthly group training available
Training locations: BGC Taguig, Greenhills & Quezon City
All ages and skill levels welcome — no experience required
